initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT c.name
FROM city ci
JOIN address a ON ci.city_id = a.city_id
JOIN customer cu ON a.address_id = cu.address_id
JOIN rental r ON cu.customer_id = r.customer_id
JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id
JOIN film_category fc ON f.film_id = fc.film_id
JOIN category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id
WHERE ci.city LIKE 'A%' OR ci.city LIKE '%-%'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY SUM(
    CAST(strftime('%s', r.return_date) AS INTEGER) - 
    CAST(strftime('%s', r.rental_date) AS INTEGER)
) / 3600.0 DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name
FROM city ci
JOIN address a ON ci.city_id = a.city_id
JOIN customer cu ON a.address_id = cu.address_id
JOIN rental r ON cu.customer_id = r.customer_id
JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id
JOIN film_category fc ON f.film_id = fc.film_id
JOIN category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id
WHERE ci.city LIKE 'A%' OR ci.city LIKE '%-%'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY SUM(
    CASE 
        WHEN r.return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 
            (julianday(r.return_date) - julianday(r.rental_date)) * 24
        ELSE 0
    END
) DESC
LIMIT 1;

ORDER BY SUM(
    CAST(strftime('%s', r.return_date) - strftime('%s', r.rental_date) AS REAL) / 3600

LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT c.name
FROM city ci
JOIN address a ON ci.city_id = a.city_id
JOIN customer cu ON a.address_id = cu.address_id
JOIN rental r ON cu.customer_id = r.customer_id
JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id
JOIN film_category fc ON f.film_id = fc.film_id
JOIN category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id
WHERE ci.city LIKE 'A%' OR ci.city LIKE '%-%'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY SUM(
    CAST(strftime('%s', r.return_date) - strftime('%s', r.rental_date) AS REAL) / 3600
) DESC
LIMIT 1;
